title: Define Wave 37 manager provider directory contract
description: Extend the architecture docs so manager flows can expose a searchable provider directory and provider profile scorecard with additive filters, score blocks, and navigation entry points from dashboard and handoff screens.
acceptance_criteria: Provider list/detail contract documents additive search, city, and category filters plus scorecard nodes
UI state map covers provider directory rows, empty/loading/error states, and provider profile scorecard rendering
Module ownership clarifies backend-owned provider scorecard derivation versus mobile navigation/presentation
